transcript: Kerr has had the bar raised to 2.36. So, last chance to finish with a true flourish. Oh, that's incredible! That is absolutely unbelievable! Hamish Kerr has just sent this crowd into raptures. The gold was guaranteed. He didn't need any further attempts, but he decided to try his luck 2.36. What a way to round off a golden day in Glasgow. Thank you.
